summary: Coach Dashboard Overhaul Phase 1-2 testing completed successfully. All 15 features verified working: 4 hero KPIs (MY ATHLETES, NEED ACTION, EVENTS THIS WEEK, DIRECTOR REQUESTS), summary card with bullet points and Review Priorities CTA, Today's Priorities section grouped by urgency (Critical/Follow-Up/Event Prep), priority rows with athlete name/action badge/reason/Open Pod CTA, critical group red styling with pulse dot, My Roster with name/grad_year/position/issue type badge/reason/NEXT step/Open Pod hover CTA, ON TRACK separator, Director Actions with Acknowledge/Resolve buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach dashboard overhaul fully tested. Key test IDs: coach-hero, coach-summary-card, review-priorities-btn, todays-priorities-card, priority-row-{id}, priority-cta-{id}, my-roster-card, roster-athlete-{id}, open-pod-{id}. Backend /api/mission-control returns summary_lines, priorities array, and next_step per roster athlete. Coach credentials: coach.williams@capymatch.com / coach123

hero_card_4_kpis.MY_ATHLETES: PASS - Shows count of assigned athletes (14)
